action.reasoning: I've completed the second training run where I unfroze the CLIP encoder and fine-tuned the entire model with a lower learning rate. The training accuracy was very high (~98%) but the validation accuracy was only 62.67%, which suggests overfitting. The training took about 93 minutes (5562 seconds), which is quite long. I need to submit this model for evaluation to see if the macro-F1 score improved compared to the previous run (0.2791).
